metadata.description: VulntraceAI — evidence-gated vulnerability research for your own coding agent. Trace source to sink, prove with a runnable PoC, then disclose only what holds up.

plugins.name: vulntraceai
plugins.description: Hunt for exploitable, CVE-grade vulnerabilities in a repository with your own Claude — trace source to sink, prove the bug with a runnable PoC, and gate the advisory behind real validation.
